reference: I understand your concern. Do not dismiss this or ignore the doctor; however, he will need to get a skin biopsy in order to definitely confirm skin cancer. Ask him to see a doctor for evaluation and determination of the need for one. I hope this helps.
text: Do not dismiss this or ignore the doctor. However, he will need to get his own biopsies in the end so he can be honest with you. Ask him to see a doctor's evaluation on the terminal screen. I hope this helps you.
